This '''man''' was a [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]] that was stationed in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin IV]]. Soon after the [[Evacuation of Yavin|evacuation]] of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] high command ordered their elite fighting force, [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]], under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to stop off at Ord Mantell for repairs and to take some leave. A [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] tracked the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] to Ord Mantell and informed the Imperial garrison.<ref name="RS" />

[[IG-88B|IG-88]] and the Imperials [[Skirmish on Ord Mantell (0.5 ABY)|ambushed]] Renegade Squadron near the junkyards in an attempt to capture them. The Scout Trooper served during the battle, but was killed when the mighty [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] shot him in the chest with his [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]] near the main junkyard.<ref name="RS" />
